author: @andrefilipebmx
text:
Hello Robert. I've seen this video, and since I have a 350W Hoverboard, I'm thinking of this project of a bike generator but also the one for a windturbine (since I have two motors). But my main questions is: How will I store or use the energy efficiently?

What would you advise to be the best/easiest way to store the energy and then use it in a nice and easy way? Obviously incorporating the generators directly into the electrical system of the house would be the best but has many risks and might be hard for a starter, so I was thinking like a 48V Battery with a normal outlet, that I could use to power my 3D Printer or my filament dryer for some limited time. Ideally, I'd have the battery connected to the wind turbine or bike while using it for powering the 3d printer, but I understand this might add some complexity, so I was first thinking of starting simple. Using the bike or wind generator to charge up a battery, which then I'd disconnect, bring it to the office, to power up some appliances, until it's depleted, and i'd take it to charge again. On a second stage, I'd try to make it all connected.

I think you see my point. What would you advise for this? I'm curious for your input!

author: @loveyourself1759
text:
I may only have a sample size of one for each, but I would like to mention it anyways:
from my tests I got twice the power output with lower input from a scooter motor over a hover board motor

both motors worked perfectly fine as motors, but as a generator, the scooter clearly wins

i can try doing some rewiring on the inside, there's some talk about chaning the paralell wires to serial, and then there's some stuff about delta and star configurations....

But I'm curious if it's just less efficient because it has an odd number of magnets for it's poles, I think 30 magnets, 27 poles

author: @DKFX1
text: You are definitely going about this the wrong way. Just seen a guy getting 25 watts slowly turning the motor with a hand crank. With a pully set up you should have no issue getting over 100 watt in moderate winds with this thing. You need to rewire a few parts inside the BLDC, slap on a bike wheel and a belt drive.

author: @chrismalcomson2824
text:
Following this project with great interest!

It just so happens that I have just acquired a hoverboard. I'm planning to do a wind project with the motors. I'm thinking of two savonius type, mounted on a stand together and shaped something like "leaves", just as a low voltage garden ornament that powers led garden lights. I also managed to salvage all 20 18650 batteries, so that's a big bonus. 

P.S. On the hoverboards main control board, I de-soldered the 4 biggest capacitors and put them in parallel after the bridge rectifier (cheap 3 phase one). They seem to be working well at smoothing for testing.

replies.author: @Teknopottu
replies.text:
I have something similar in mind but maybe a bit bigger setup. Two oil drum savoniuses on top of each other on 90° angle on each other. Have several hoverboard motors, maybe spun with bicycle gears and chain. I have almost everything needed gathered up, only ball bearings durable enough are on the list. Maybe from a car... Going with close to zero budget on mind so getting all needed can take time.

What kind of setup do you have or is it still on paper?

replies.author: @chrismalcomson2824

replies.author: @Teknopottu

author: @kevinleebailey
text: If you make your blade's out of something that has a larger circumference it will spin a lot faster. I made some out of a cheap builders bucket and got much faster RPMS than from blade's made from gutter pipe.

replies.author: @kevinleebailey
replies.text: Basically the blades cut with less friction. Yes they will need a faster wind speed to get things going. But when they do the RPM will be a lot faster.

author: @danielingraham9701
text:
Today I am Heavy Hearted. 

For Years I Enjoyed your channel and looked with anticipation for your next video. I shared your name with every one that seemed to possess some level of interest in something I learned from your channel. Your channel has been my anchor to still push foreword in my health in hopes that maybe , just maybe , I will be able to create a little mobile workshop to do the similar creations myself and to finally produce a the prototype for a whole new style Electric Motor. I done my homework including learning everything I needed to know and more to ensure it works. While trying to hold to the old saying "KISS" ( Keep It Simple Stupid ) which entailed many times back stepping and revising the designs and reworking the equations all in the process to keep it as simple as possible so that anyone can build. I started off with a 30 watt design and I was impressed with the results on paper,  but I knew I could do better. I Eventually settled with a 60watt design that would have more power per revolution than the 150cc gas engine puts out on it's firing revolution ( that was on my cheap Chinese scooter ( That was not worth the money , if one is looking for reliability and to save money by seeking alternative transportation ).

However: This is not the reason for my post. To my horror this morning, I find that the only video I can access of yours , is this one. All the others even the ones I just viewed a few days back, now require me to be a paid Member. This is horrifying to me , Not because I may have to pay $5 a month. But, because, now I can no longer Tell People to check out your channel . "To See For Themself" some of the things your working or have worked on . I must drop you from my vocabulary when talking with others as The Location they can go to and see for themselves. This Saddens me Greatly, For you have been for so long , Someone that I used as my example for : Why I do not want to patent any Idea I have. Why I rather just put it out there for all to benefit . And Why I want to start my own Channel . But for the simple reason your channel has now put in place a Barrier (A Wall ) Blocking individuals to visit your site and see that , Greed does not have to rule one for helping others even with information . I understand that you have financial needs as I barely get by each month , but it doesn't stop me from helping others at financial cost to myself and at physical cost at times as well. It's Who I am ! Five Dollars might not sound like much , but for those who are trying to find an alternative means to get on their feet , Might as well be a trillion dollars. For those I would normally share your information with to inspire them to expand their mind and reach for that which they may at the moment see as impossible, I No Longer have  the knowledge that if I share a reference to one of your videos, that it will be accessible for them to see .

It is my fault I have not made some form of mobile workshop for myself, because I do not know how to turn my eyes away from others when they are need of physical help. I tend to put others before myself. I have had to learned to be more selective so not to throw away my life and time on those that rely on others to do what they simply choose not to , even though it is within their ability to do so. And I try to inspire a spirit when I help others , to pay it foreword. For they will cross paths with someone they too can help and should help. 

I will be making a choice at becoming a member, but it will be coming at a cost 
 Part of that cost is the lost enjoyment that I no longer have the ability to tell others to check out your channel or check out a specific video. So do I become a member even though there is no provision of free videos that can be shared within conservation . I might as well Light a Candle , Place it under a metal bucket , and tell people, "There is a light in this Pitch Black Room , But you must get up and stumble your way to at personal risk to yourself. But Trust me, The light is there. Much Easier Sale if their is at Least a Flicker of light to let people know it is there and that light is real. 

So if I choose to become a Member , Will I enjoy that membership Like the enjoyment I used to get from your channel . Seeing how Required Membership eliminates the ability to share. Eliminates the Word Of Mouth Element from the Equation. 


Thus today my heart is broken that I must decide. 

So many times I wanted to reach out and share things with you that I created on paper and worked out the problems through research and learning, to ensure what I share with you would be spot on . But I let my stubbornness to be the first to physically create it , hinder me from doing so. Even though at that time, I knew you would put that information out there on your own channel and maybe even with some of your own improvements. As I know you would have enjoyed that knowledge I desired to share freely .  But Now that hope of sharing with you so that you may share with others has been replaced with "I will share it with you once you pay me."

What cost is this move going to inflict on the growth of your channels ?? Do You Know , Do you Know  how many individuals will not even check out your channel because denied the ability . I don't Know . I can't Answer that . Time Will Know. Time Will Tell. 

So the freedom for individuals to stumble across or even follow up on a reference to check out your channel , Well that is gone , because your now Limited ( maybe even Eliminated ) the views you get from Strangers and in essential turned away those that would also become members for the simple fact: Like me this morning , accessing even the videos that were accessible a couple days ago without being a paying member, are now not accessible. Which was your part of the advertising for your channel, can no longer be shared with others to promote it . 

With out that ability , this means of letting others see for themself that you were the model for which Teachers Should all inspire to be. You were the Model that A person does not have to limit themself by limiting their minds. You were the Model that Greed ( Even out of necessity ) Does not have to rule one's actions and one's life.

 This advertising , of everything you once stood for, that door has now been closed.  Might Need to revise and edit  some of your early videos , So that this expression you use to verbally reference and physically live , will no longer be found. 

I get it you have needs that must be tended to. And thus there is a Paid Membership for certain Videos and instructions to be found within that Paid Membership . However, If posted Videos were not required to be a member, those should remain as such. They Are Your Advertising . They Are Your Brand. And They allow those Early Videos to speak " I have Held to Certain Values in the past and those Values Still Remain Stead Fast within the Person I Have Become Today . 

People like to know what they are going to be paying for , before they choose to pay . For that  good and healthy business practice has now been thrown out the window as what was the accessible videos you had posted for anyone to see , they cannot view again and thus they cannot share with others they meet or friends.( Essentially , if they want to encourage someone to check out your channel, You just made that task a great deal more difficult. As they will have to convince others to first pay for membership in order to just check out your channel. A Hard Sale Indeed. For some they might sell someone to do so. But Statically Unlikely to do so. ) That ability and door has now been replaced with a Wall that denies and cripples people form being New Potential Members as it blinds them from seeing and Experiencing who and what you and your channel is about. 

    Today I am greatly Saddened and Heart Broken to see this change take place within you. 

    Today I will be contemplating Do I Be Selfish and Subscribe ( Yes I would take comfort in helping you by doing so ) Or Should I risk Forgetting about your channel until I can create my own alternative transportation that would enable me to pay for subscriptions like your channel by eliminating the overhead cost of a gas vehicle.  But regardless of my choice here, I am will be greatly heavy hearted that I am now no longer able to encourage others to check out your site for inspiration and to learn the empowerment that can be found in "Give it a Try Mentality , and if it doesn't work, discover why "

Sincerely Your Unknown Fan, Follower, and Student from across the seas. For You Were the Model of what every American should be.

replies.author: @danielingraham9701
replies.text: Emphasis : I do not Mind at all becoming a paying member . For years I wanted to donate . So my above comment has nothing to do with me paying for a subscription. If one Reads the Entirety of the post . One Will know the heart of the expression of the post.  I have Been and Still to this day have the greatest respect and Admiration for Robert and what he has done and Has Been as a person .

author: @wizrom3046
text:
If you make your 3 phase rectifier from 1N5819 schottky diodes it will have much lower voltage drop (ie better efficiency) than the garden variety 1N4007 type diodes.
1N5819 should be easily available on eBay.

author: @401ksolar
text: Could you do a breakdown of your measurement setup? ie; when you say you are switching to amps can you do a close up of your instruments and connections? the readings in milliamps do not quite make sense to me because to read amps  the ammeter must be in series with the load. What gives?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: sorry mate I do this so many times I often forget to give those details as they are in other vids but I read volts in parallel and amps in series with a resistive load - on occasion I will use an inductive load but not often and I usually say if I am doing that

replies.author: @wizrom3046
replies.text:
@ThinkingandTinkering if you are doing that it is critically important to state what the resistance of your resistive load is, otherwise the values are almost meaningless.
For instance, at those RPMs that motor into a low resistance load would easily have generated a couple of amps.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: @wizrom3046 Mate it can only generate what I put in - at full tilt I could best generate maybe 60W from arm power alone - check out the Stanford tables on this. I would guess I was managing maybe 20 watts so at 50 volts or so  the most it could be would be milliamps - I am sorry but it just doesn't make sense to me to say a generator can generate more than is put in - it can only do less than that

replies.author: @wizrom3046
replies.text:
Yes I know, I've been an electronics professional for almost 40 years now. 🙂
I did say "a low resistance load", so if your load resistor was 2 ohms it could easily put out 2 amps into 2 ohms, or 8 watts.
That's why it's really important to say what resistance your load is, it makes all the other numbers make sense.
Anyway I've really been enjoying your channel, your innovation, enthusiasm and fun factor makes your vids very watchable. 👍

author: @dexterdixon2000
text: It's the rate of change of flux that you're discussing. Yes you can double the rpm but you can also double the number of poles. Comparing this motor to your previous one is somewhat problematic because it's no ot just the magnetic chemistry that'll've changed - pole number, turns per phase and flux density of pole (regardless of material) are all going to be different.   It's perfectly possible to design and build an alternator for lower rpms - your project of repurposing motors it will probably be about running them close to their original design rpm (/voltage). Curious - what was the load to only see 50mA @50V? I'd have thought you could have got a good couple of hundred W with that setup. Final thought - I'd suggest getting a slick tyre bike for these (very useful) bike demos - much quieter!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: exactly mate - and we are talking frames of reference doubling the poles or doubling the speed is essentially the same thing - the pole doubling is lifted physically though and more of a limitation than speed doubling - nice suggestion on the tyre lol

author: @AKIOTV
text:
If you want a higher voltage from one of those hoverboard wheels you can easily reconfigure the windings. I'm using one of these for a wind turbine and tore it down to see how the windings are connected.

It turns out these motors use a Y-connection, but unlike the typical Y-connection where the poles that belong to one phase are in series, these motors have them in parallel. So effectively, inside that wheel is 3 Y-connected generators hooked up in parallel. Therefore if you take these windings and put them in series, you get triple the voltage for a given speed, but also more losses due to the increased internal resistance.

I ended up putting the windings in series, but then using a delta connection instead, giving me a good compromise between output voltage and winding resistance.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: very nice tip mate thank you

replies.author: @Teknopottu
replies.text: This is a great tip. No need to disassemble motor myself to figure out the windings. Planning to go with vanilla windings.

author: @alaingrignon
text: @Rob, just to be clear, in my simple mind, higher spinning requires more torque. In a Wind generator, this means the "blades" need higher winds to generate significant electricity. Which I interpret as, there's no free lunch!

replies.author: @ryanjamesloyd6733
replies.text:
No free lunch, but I think there's ways to hack it. Robs low torque coreless coil wind turbine design for instance-  I think you could stack 2 of those on top of each other, with the coils on top of one, and the magnets on the bottom of the other,  and each set so they counter rotated at the same speed in the same wind, and get double the relative speed between magnets and coils, and thus greater output from them. 

Or with a hand crank, do it like the wimhof generator wheels, and just put your magnets and coils on the inner faces between them- that would get you double the relative speed between them for roughly the same effort of cranking one. 

I guess you could do it with a motor too- counter rotate the stator and rotor, though in that case you Do have to worry about the torque.
